message.content:
```plaintext
@startuml
skinparam lifelineColor #006699
skinparam participantBorderColor #006699
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam sequenceMessageBackgroundColor white
skinparam sequenceMessageBorderColor black
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #006699

actor "User" as U
boundary "ZMDomačaStran" as ZM
control "KrmilnikNovica" as KN
control "KrmilnikPredloga" as KP
control "KrmilnikDogodek" as KD
entity "PredlogProjekta" as PP
entity "Novica" as N
boundary "SVGoogleCalendar API" as SVGC

U -> ZM: Pridi na domačo stran
activate ZM
ZM -> KN: Pokaži novice
activate KN
KN -> N: Vrni novice
activate N
N --> KN: Novice
deactivate N
KN --> ZM: Novice
deactivate KN
ZM -> KP: Pokaži predloge projektov
activate KP
KP -> PP: Vrni predloge projektov
activate PP
PP --> KP: Predlogi projektov
deactivate PP
KP --> ZM: Predlogi projektov
deactivate KP
ZM -> KD: Pokaži dogodke
activate KD
KD -> SVGC: Vrni dogodke
activate SVGC
SVGC --> KD: Dogodki
deactivate SVGC
KD --> ZM: Dogodki
deactivate KD
ZM --> U: Domača stran
deactivate ZM

@enduml
```
